2 And David arose, and. he passed over with the six. hundred men: that were with: him unto:Achish, the: son of Maoch, king of Gath.
This psalm was composed by David, when Achish, or Abimelech, king of Gath, drove him from his court as an idiot or madman, 1 Sam. 21:10-15.

This psalm was penned by David, when he fled from Saul in the cave; 1 Sam. 24

Family.

This psalm was, perhaps, composed on the same occasion as the former, when David fled from Absalom his son.
